Kidplokio 41pc Police Station for Toy Cars Playset, Blue, Boys, Ages 3+

Recreate the hustle and bustle of a busy police station with this 41pc DIY Assembly Police Station Playset from Kidplokio. The police station firefighter playset is a unique, multipiece assembly kids’ toy, complete with helicopter, sliding roadway tracks, road signs, police car and police personnel. Not only will your little one be occupied for hours with this police station playset, half the fun of it is putting the whole ensemble together. With just under 40 pieces to assemble, crafty DIY kidlets will have a blast working with friends or family to create the police station, while building confidence and pride in their work!

Your little policeman or policewomen in training can maneuver police car vehicles throughout the police station, using the tracks to race out on an emergency call; compatible with most common 1:64 model diecast cars, kids can incorporate other toy cars or trucks for endless pretend play possibilities! And lastly, this police station playset will not only provide hours of playtime fun, kids will be engaging in crucial early educational activities, like working their fine and gross motor skills, as well as cognitive problem solving development through these DIY building and imaginative pretend play sessions.

Key Features

  • 41PC DIY POLICE STATION PLAYSET: Recreate the hustle and bustle of a busy police station with this unique playset! Featuring two levels, a helicopter pad and lots of accessories, this is an awesome gift for kids and toddlers who love DIY, building and creating, as some assembly is required before the police work can begin!
  • DIY POLICE STATION ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Part of the fun of this police playset is putting the police station and helicopter pad together; with just under 40 pieces to assemble, crafty DIY kidlets will have a blast working with friends or family to create the police station, while building confidence and pride in their work!
  • ENDLESS PRETEND PLAY POSSIBILITIES: Your little police personnel can maneuver their toy cars throughout the police station, using the tracks to quickly head out on an emergency call; compatible with most common 1:64 model diecast cars, kids can incorporate other toy cars or trucks for endless police pretend play possibilities!
  • EDUCATIONAL LEARNING TOYS: Not only will your little one be occupied for hours with this police station playset, they’ll be engaging in crucial early educational activities like working their fine and gross motor skills, as well as cognitive problem solving development through these DIY building and imaginative pretend play sessions
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Box Dimensions: 15.5 x 10 x 3 inches; Color: Blue; Material: Plastic; Weight: 1.55lbs; Warning: Choking Hazard, small parts; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KP2A066BLPS
  • UPC: 810058480408
  • Color: Police Station
  • Size: Medium
